summary: Live preflight shows no open candidates remain. The original representative #59262 is closed; its feature goal is already covered on current main by memory-core Dreaming, but the hydrated Codex review also reports committed runtime logs with personal/contact data, so that PR is routed to central security handling. Closed context refs remain evidence only; no close, merge, fix, or PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive evidence is scoped to #59262; route to central OpenClaw security triage and do not mutate the PR.
